title: While Trump has long reveled in throwing his weight around on the world stage and forcing leaders to cater to him, hi…
description: While Trump has long reveled in throwing his weight around on the world stage and forcing leaders to cater to him, his growing provocations and declining political stock appear to have steeled some of those leaders’ spines to speak out against him. | Analysis
author: cnn.com

title: The United States is through to the knockout rounds of the 2026 World Cup after a 2-0 win over Australia in a game th…
description: The United States is through to the knockout rounds of the 2026 World Cup after a 2-0 win over Australia in a game that got increasingly tense in the second half despite a comfortable American lead. https://cnn.it/3QgOXpv

title: President Donald Trump is at Joint Base Andrews unveiling a new presidential aircraft: a luxury jet donated by the go…
description: President Donald Trump is at Joint Base Andrews unveiling a new presidential aircraft: a luxury jet donated by the government of Qatar that has been painted red, white and blue and adorned with the words “United States of America.” https://cnn.it/4uLkjCA

title: Boston's bars have stocked up on their beer shipments, as they prepare to host Scottish fans for a second time in a w…
description: Boston's bars have stocked up on their beer shipments, as they prepare to host Scottish fans for a second time in a week. Some bars nearly ran out of beer last weekend when Scotland played their first World Cup match in 28 years and fans descended on the city. Scotland face Morocco later today.
author: cnn.com
